decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using Goblins. Utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly get Goblins onto the battlefield, supported by abilities from Goblin Warchief and Goblin Piledriver to create a powerful board presence. Wasteland and Rishadan Port are used to disrupt the opponent's mana base, while Gempalm Incinerator can deal with opposing creatures. Siege-Gang Commander adds additional token generation and removal, making it difficult for the opponent to keep up with the relentless Goblin onslaught.

The deck focuses on aggressively pushing for damage on the opponent, utilizing burn spells and efficient creatures to deal quick damage. Cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Price of Progress punish opponents for playing nonbasic lands, while creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup provide early pressure. The deck's goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and consistent stream of damage, while also utilizing cards like Cursed Scroll to maintain pressure in the late game. The deck's strategy revolves around controlling the board and quickly finishing off the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with low-cost, aggressive creatures and burn spells. By efficiently dealing damage early in the game and preventing the opponent from gaining life with cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Pyrostatic Pillar, the deck aims to secure a fast victory before the opponent can stabilize. The focus is on maintaining pressure and keeping the opponent on the back foot, utilizing direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast to close out the game.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with small, aggressive creatures and efficient burn spells. By applying constant pressure and dealing direct damage, the aim is to finish the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize. The deck also includes cards that prevent the opponent from gaining life or being able to effectively stabilize, ensuring that the aggressive strategy can be successful. With a low mana curve and high damage potential, this deck aims to win the game swiftly and decisively.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy through a combination of removal spells, discard effects, and board wipes. It aims to control the game by eliminating threats, forcing opponents to discard key cards, and maintaining card advantage through cycling lands and drawing cards. The deck also has the ability to generate tokens with Decree of Justice for a win condition. Overall, the key concept of this BW Control deck is to stall the game and outvalue opponents while controlling the board.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive, low-cost creatures and direct burn spells. By utilizing Seal of Fire, Mogg Fanatic, Jackal Pup, and Ball Lightning, this deck aims to deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. The inclusion of Sulfuric Vortex and Cursed Scroll adds extra burn damage to supplement the aggressive creature strategy. With a combination of efficient creatures and direct damage spells, this deck aims to close out the game swiftly before the opponent can establish a solid defense.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana and playing aggressive threats like Terravore and Nimble Mongoose, while disrupting opponents' land base with cards like Wasteland and Armageddon. This creates a resource advantage for the player, allowing them to maintain pressure on the opponent while controlling the board with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Vindicate. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its efficient threats and disruptive elements, ultimately leading to a fast and decisive victory.

The deck focuses on aggressive play using land destruction and ramping up with Terravore to quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Weathered Wayfarer and Swords to Plowshares while using cards like Armageddon to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and Call of the Herd provide card advantage and additional threats on the board. Overall, the deck aims to be proactive and quickly close out games before opponents can stabilize.

This deck focuses on creating a lock on the opponent with Stasis and Forsaken City, while using Gush and Impulse to dig for combo pieces. Counterspell, Daze, and Thwart protect the combo, while Chain of Vapor provides utility and disruption. Black Vise puts pressure on the opponent's hand size, and Despotic Scepter can be used to break the lock when needed. Flash of Insight and Arcane Denial provide additional card advantage and control elements. Ultimately, the deck aims to stall the game until it can assemble its combo and win the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures, such as Phantom Nishoba and Akroma, Angel of Wrath, using cards like Careful Study and Dark Ritual, in order to then bring them back into play using Reanimate and Exhume. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with high-powered creatures early in the game, using the reanimation combo to surprise and overpower the opponent's defenses. The key strategy is to efficiently and effectively reanimate powerful creatures to gain a significant advantage in the game.

This deck focuses on using Counterspells, removal spells, and land denial tactics to control the game and prevent the opponent from developing their board and winning conditions. The main win condition of this deck is to lock the opponent out of the game with a combination of Standstill, Mana Leak, and Counterspell while slowly chipping away at their life total with Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave. The deck aims to stall the game until it can secure a win with Decree of Justice or Humility.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana through enchantments like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, while also drawing cards and controlling the board with Enchantress effects like Enchantress's Presence and Mirri's Guile. The win condition is to use Opalescence and enchantment recursion cards like Replenish to turn all your enchantments, including Serra's Sanctum, into creatures and attack for lethal damage. The deck aims to protect its enchantments with cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing while stalling the opponent with cards like Solitary Confinement and Elephant Grass.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy utilizing Elves as the primary creature type. The deck aims to generate mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania, allowing for explosive plays with powerful creatures such as Deranged Hermit and Masticore. The inclusion of cards like Survival of the Fittest and Wirewood Symbiote adds versatility and resilience to the deck, while also providing card advantage. Overall, the deck seeks to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize enchantresses like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards whenever you cast an enchantment spell. By chaining enchantments together, you can generate a lot of card advantage and find key pieces of your combo. The deck also includes powerful enchantments such as Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the board and threaten the opponent. Serra's Sanctum provides additional mana to cast your enchantments, while cards like Mirri's Guile and Exploration help you find the pieces you need to win the game.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and card advantage through cards like Sylvan Library and Graveborn Muse. The key strategy is to outvalue the opponent by efficiently answering threats and generating card advantage while gradually building a board presence with creatures like Wall of Blossoms and Ravenous Baloth. Additionally, the Living Wish package allows for flexible tutoring to access silver bullets in the sideboard, giving the deck the tools to adapt to different matchups and strategies.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, along with efficient burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Ball Lightning and Flame Rift further emphasizes the aggressive nature of the deck, while cards like Grim Lavamancer provide additional reach and removal options. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish the opponent off before they can stabilize.
